subcodes.first_line: They say "What God willeth shall come to pass," meaning that whatsoever God desireth will verily transpire. In the verse of the Qur'án He saith: "O thou soul that art at rest..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: گويند که ما شاء الله کان ، يعنی هر چه خدا خواهد واقع خواهد شد در آيه قرآن ميفرمايد يا ايّتها النّفس المطمئنّة
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @development of capacity and readiness, @soul; spirit after death, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
